hero.heading: About Roomchang
hero.body: Founded in 1996 by a vision to bring specialist dental care to Cambodia, Roomchang has grown into the country's most trusted dental group — serving local families and international patients from across Asia, Australia, and beyond.

history.heading: A Hospital, Not Just a Clinic
history.paragraph1: Roomchang Dental Hospital was built on the belief that Cambodian patients deserved access to the same quality of care available in the most advanced dental centres in the world — without having to travel abroad to get it.
history.paragraph2: Over nearly 30 years, we've grown from a single practice to a hospital-scale group with five branches across Phnom Penh, an in-house digital laboratory, and a specialist team covering every major dental discipline.
history.paragraph3: Today, Roomchang treats thousands of patients every month — from routine checkups to complex full-mouth reconstructions — and serves international visitors from more than 20 countries who choose Cambodia for high-quality, cost-effective dental care delivered to the same standards as leading clinics abroad.

1996.caption: The beginning
1996.heading: Our First Home
1996.body: A single practice. A single belief — that Cambodians deserved world-class dental care at home. Dr. Tith Hong Yoeu opens Roomchang as Cambodia's first specialist dental clinic built to international standards.

2002.caption: Roots deepen
2002.heading: Our First Move
2002.body: A second location. New equipment. The same uncompromising standard — now reaching more of Phnom Penh. The foundations of a multi-branch group are quietly being laid.

2008.caption: Recognition
2008.heading: First ISO Certification
2008.body: Roomchang earns its first ISO certification — the first dental facility in Cambodia to achieve international quality management standards, setting the benchmark for clinical excellence in the country.

2011.caption: A new era
2011.heading: Taking the Next Step
2011.body: The flagship 10-storey dental hospital opens — purpose-built with 46 dental chairs, 4 operation rooms, an in-house CAD/CAM laboratory, and hospital-grade sterilisation. Cambodia's most advanced dental facility.

2014.caption: Expanding reach
2014.heading: Rose Condo Branch
2014.body: Roomchang opens at Rose Condo — bringing specialist dental care to one of Phnom Penh's growing residential communities, with the same team and standards as the main hospital.

2018.caption: Going further
2018.heading: AEON Mall Sen Sok
2018.body: A new branch inside AEON Mall Sen Sok — making specialist dental care accessible in one of Phnom Penh's busiest shopping destinations, serving families and walk-in patients in the city's northern corridor.
2018.alt: Roomchang AEON Mall Sen Sok branch, 2018

2022a.caption: Growth continues
2022a.heading: PH Euro Park
2022a.body: Roomchang opens at PH Euro Park — extending our reach to another key area of Phnom Penh with a fully equipped branch delivering the full range of specialist dental services.

2022b.caption: Five branches
2022b.heading: Fun Mall — TK Avenue
2022b.body: The fifth branch opens at Fun Mall on TK Avenue — completing Roomchang's network of five locations across Phnom Penh, each delivering the same specialist care and hospital-grade standards.
2022b.alt: Roomchang Fun Mall TK Avenue branch, 2022

now.caption: A hospital network
now.heading: Present Day
now.body: Five branches. Seventy-four chairs. 37+ specialist dentists. 9 operation rooms. Thousands of patients every month. And the same conviction that started it all — quality care, close to home.
now.alt: Roomchang Dental Hospital — present day aerial view

hero.heading: Treatment Prices
hero.body: We believe in clear, upfront pricing — no hidden fees. All prices below are in USD and reflect actual treatment costs. Your exact quote will be confirmed after consultation and X-rays.
hero.consultationNote: *Subject to case complexity. Some cases may incur a consultation fee.

pricing.consultationDisclaimer: *Subject to case complexity. Some cases may incur a consultation fee. All prices in USD. Final pricing confirmed after clinical assessment. Prices subject to change — please contact us for the latest quote.
pricing.internationalCompareNote: Travelling from abroad? See how our prices compare to Australia across the full ADA treatment schedule.

cta.heading: Get your exact quote
cta.body: Send us your X-rays or photos and we'll provide a detailed treatment plan with exact pricing within two business days — at no charge.

comparison.heading: How Roomchang Compares — Australia & Singapore
comparison.subheading: Every treatment below follows the Australian Dental Association (ADA) schedule, with indicative prices in Australia and Singapore alongside ours. Same international-quality materials and protocols — at a fraction of the cost.
comparison.ctaBody: Send us your X-rays or photos and we'll prepare a detailed treatment plan with exact pricing within two business days — at no charge.
comparison.sourceNote: Australian prices sourced from the Australian Dental Association's 2022 fee survey (charges have since risen ~10–25%). Singapore figures are indicative, based on the Ministry of Health (MOH) fee benchmarks for common procedures and typical private-clinic ranges; actual fees vary and are subject to GST.

portrait.alt: Dr. Tith Hong Yoeu — Founder & Director, Roomchang Dental Hospital
portrait.name: Dr. Tith Hong Yoeu

letter.paragraph1: Thank you for entrusting your dental care to Roomchang. Over the last three decades, we have always had a strong commitment to providing quality dentistry to everyone — regardless of background, nationality, or the complexity of the case.
letter.paragraph2: When I founded Roomchang in 1996, my goal was simple: to build a dental hospital in Cambodia that could match the standard of care available anywhere in the world. That vision hasn't changed. What has changed is the scale at which we can deliver it — five branches, 74 chairs, a full in-house digital laboratory, and a team of 37 specialist dentists.
letter.paragraph3: We maintain strict ethical codes and invest continuously in the latest equipment and procedures. Our partnership with Prof. Nentwig and Goethe University of Frankfurt, Germany has been instrumental in shaping Roomchang's clinical philosophy — bringing European standards of implantology and oral surgery to our daily practice.
letter.paragraph4: Every member of our team — from our specialists to our front-desk staff — shares a belief that dentistry should be transparent, accessible, and delivered with genuine care. We don't just treat teeth; we build trust.
letter.paragraph5: I'm grateful for the support our patients have given us over the years. It is your confidence in us that drives us to keep improving, keep innovating, and keep showing up every day with the same commitment we started with.

vision.label: Vision
vision.description: We see a Cambodia where every person has access to world-class dental care — and where choosing local doesn't mean compromising on quality.

mission.label: Mission
mission.statement: We truly care for your teeth.
mission.description: Every treatment plan is designed around the patient — not the procedure. We listen, educate, and deliver care that respects your time, your budget, and your goals.

values.heading: Our Core Values
values.intro: Five principles shape every interaction at Roomchang, from how we design treatments to how we answer the phone.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.description: Our team holds international qualifications and operates to the highest clinical standards, guided by rigorous internal protocols and continuous training.

honesty.title: Honesty
honesty.description: Clear pricing, transparent treatment options, and no hidden fees. We believe informed patients make the best decisions.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.description: A collaborative environment where specialists across disciplines work together to deliver the best outcome for every patient.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We invest continuously in technology — from CAD/CAM digital labs to 3D CBCT imaging — to stay at the forefront of dentistry.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: From routine check-ups to complex full-mouth reconstructions, we hold ourselves to the same standard of excellence every time.

cta.heading: See our values in action
cta.description: Meet the specialist team that brings these principles to life every day.

xrayPregnancy.question: How long should you wait after getting an x-ray before starting preparations for pregnancy?
xrayPregnancy.answer: It is not necessary to wait after an x-ray before preparing for pregnancy. Dental x-ray is usually safe, even for emergency treatments during pregnancy. However, it is better if the patient takes it to detect any dental problems before preparing for pregnancy. Should a problem be detected, the treatment should be done in advance of pregnancy.

meta.title: FAQ | Roomchang Dental Hospital
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about dental treatments, costs, and visiting Roomchang Dental Hospital in Phnom Penh.

hero.title: Publication & Research
hero.intro: Dentists at Roomchang do more than provide clinical care. They are also actively involved in research that helps improve diagnosis, treatment planning, materials, techniques, and long-term patient outcomes. Through education and research, dental professionals continue to advance evidence-based care and bring the latest knowledge into everyday clinical practice.

cta.title: Interested in collaborating?
cta.body: Roomchang welcomes research collaborations with universities and dental institutions worldwide.

hero.title: Dentist Talks
hero.intro: Hear directly from Roomchang's dentists as they explain common dental concerns, treatment options, modern technologies, and how patients can make informed decisions about their oral health.

intro.heading: Expert Dental Advice from Roomchang
intro.paragraph1: At Roomchang Dental Hospital, patient education is part of every treatment journey. In this video series, our dentists share practical insights about dental care, treatment planning, prevention, and advanced procedures available at Roomchang.
intro.paragraph2: Whether you are considering implants, braces, veneers, crowns, whitening, or routine care, these talks are designed to help you better understand your options before starting treatment.

whyMatter.heading: Why These Talks Matter
whyMatter.paragraph: Dental treatment should never feel confusing. Our goal is to give patients clear, reliable information from experienced dentists, so they can feel confident about their care. These videos are especially helpful for patients who want to understand their treatment before visiting Roomchang, including local patients, international patients, and families planning dental care in Phnom Penh.

videos.heading: Watch Our Dentists Explain
videos.intro: Learn from Roomchang dentists through short, informative videos covering everyday dental questions and advanced treatment topics.
videos.cardDescription: Watch this Roomchang Dentist Talks video from the official YouTube playlist.

cta.heading: Have more questions?
cta.body: Our team is ready to help. Book a free consultation and get personalised advice from our specialist dentists.

hero.title: Dental Implants Price Comparison
hero.body: Patients often ask how Roomchang can offer dental implants at roughly half the Australian price. The short answer: same materials, lower overheads. Here's the honest breakdown.

costDrivers.heading: Three things drive the price of a dental implant
costDrivers.intro: Material quality, lab work, and clinical overheads. Only two of those three vary by country — and that's where the savings come from.

materials.title: Implant materials
materials.body: Every dental implant has three parts — the titanium implant, an abutment, and a crown (E-max, ceramic fused to metal, or zirconium). Roomchang uses Myplant Two® from Germany, internationally recognised as one of the most reliable and stable implant systems on the market. Material cost is the same whether the implant is placed in Phnom Penh or Perth.

laboratory.title: Laboratory fees
laboratory.body: Roomchang operates an in-house CAD/CAM dental laboratory. Crowns, bridges, and custom abutments are designed and fabricated on-site — we don't pay a third-party lab markup the way Australian clinics do. That single line item accounts for a large share of the price difference on anything involving a crown or bridge.

overheads.title: Dentist fees & overheads
overheads.body: The 2022 Australian Dental Association survey put private-practice chair time at AUD $400–$700 per hour. Cost of living and commercial rent in Cambodia are dramatically lower, so our overheads are lower. Our specialists are internationally trained — many of them in Japan, Korea, and Australia — but their practice costs don't compare.

material.eyebrow: Material quality is not where we save
material.title: Myplant Two® — the same German implant system used by leading clinics worldwide
material.body: Cheap implants exist. We don't use them. Roomchang's standard implant is Myplant Two®, a German-engineered titanium system with over a decade of clinical outcomes behind it. The implant sitting in a patient's jaw in Phnom Penh is the same part number that would be placed in Munich, Sydney, or London. Where we save money is in the lab and in clinic operating costs — never in the part we leave in your body.

table.heading: Implant price comparison
table.intro: All Roomchang prices in USD. Australian prices reflect the 2022 ADA fee survey plus typical 10–25% increases through 2026. Final price depends on bone condition, abutment type, and crown material — confirmed after consultation and CT imaging.

cta.heading: Ready to plan your implants?
cta.body: Send us your OPG, CT scan, or recent photos. We'll come back within two business days with a full treatment plan and an exact quote — no charge, no obligation.

meta.title: Dental Implants Price Comparison | Roomchang Dental Hospital
meta.description: Why Roomchang's dental implants cost a fraction of Australian prices without compromising material quality — a breakdown of implant costs and the Myplant Two® system.

whoWeAre.heading: Who We Are
whoWeAre.intro: Roomchang Dental Hospital is a dental hospital founded in 1996 in Phnom Penh, Cambodia. We serve local and international patients through a multilingual website in English, Chinese, and Khmer.
whoWeAre.contact: Our main address is {address}. You can contact us at {email}, {phone1}, or {phone2}, which is available 24/7.

informationWeCollect.heading: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.intro: When you submit an enquiry or appointment request through this website, we may collect the information you choose to provide, including:

items.contactDetails: Name, email address, phone, WhatsApp, Telegram, or WeChat details.
items.preferences: Country, treatment interest, preferred branch, preferred doctor, and preferred date.
items.message: Any message or notes you include with your request.

informationWeCollect.referral: We may also receive a first-party referral code if you arrived through a valid Roomchang referral link.

howWeUse.heading: How We Use Information
howWeUse.purpose: We use submitted information to respond to enquiries, manage appointment requests, coordinate with the relevant clinic team, and improve the way we support patients before their visit.
howWeUse.storage: Website form submissions are stored securely in Supabase, and notification emails are sent to the clinic so that the team can follow up. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

clinicalRecords.heading: Clinical Records
clinicalRecords.body: This policy covers information submitted through the website. Clinical, dental, and medical records created during care at Roomchang Dental Hospital are governed separately by the hospital's medical record practices.

yourRights.heading: Your Rights
yourRights.body: You may ask to access, correct, or delete personal information submitted through the website by contacting {email}. We may need to verify your request before making changes.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: For privacy questions, contact Roomchang Dental Hospital at {email} or by phone at {phone1} or {phone2}.

agreement.heading: Agreement to These Terms
agreement.body1: These Terms of Service apply to your use of the Roomchang Dental Hospital website. Roomchang Dental Hospital was founded in 1996 and is located at No. 4, Street 184, Phnom Penh, Cambodia.
agreement.body2: By using this website, you agree to use it lawfully and in a way that does not interfere with the site, its security, or other users.

content.heading: Website Content
content.body1: The content on this website is provided for general information about dental care, Roomchang Dental Hospital, and available services. It is not a substitute for professional dental, medical, or clinical advice.
content.body2: No doctor-patient relationship is created by viewing this website, submitting a form, sending a message, or receiving a general response through the website. A clinical relationship begins only through appropriate consultation and acceptance by the hospital team.

appointments.heading: Appointment Requests
appointments.body: Website forms allow you to request information or ask for an appointment. Submitting a request does not guarantee a booking, treatment availability, a specific doctor, or a specific appointment time. A Roomchang team member will confirm details with you directly.

intellectualProperty.heading: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.body: The website design, text, images, logos, service descriptions, and other content are owned by or licensed to Roomchang Dental Hospital unless otherwise stated. You may view the site for personal, informational use, but you may not copy, reuse, or distribute website content without permission.

liability.heading: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: We aim to keep website information accurate and available, but we do not guarantee that the website will always be complete, current, error-free, or uninterrupted. To the extent permitted by law, Roomchang Dental Hospital is not liable for losses arising from website use, reliance on general website content, or technical issues outside our reasonable control.

governingLaw.heading: Governing Law
governingLaw.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Cambodia.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: Questions about these terms may be sent to contact@roomchang.com or directed to +855 69 811 338 or +855 11 811 338.

usage.heading: How This Website Uses Cookies
usage.body: This policy explains the cookies and browser storage used by the Roomchang Dental Hospital website. Essential cookies are needed for parts of the site to function correctly. We do not use third-party advertising or marketing cookies.

essential.heading: Essential Cookies
essential.rcRef: a first-party, HTTP-only referral cookie set when a valid Roomchang referral code is present in the website URL. It lasts for about 30 days and helps connect website enquiries with the referral source.
essential.rcPreviewSession: a first-party, HTTP-only cookie used to protect CMS preview access for authorized users. It is not used for public advertising or marketing.

analytics.heading: Analytics and Performance
analytics.body: The website uses Vercel Web Analytics and Vercel Speed Insights to understand aggregate traffic and performance. These tools provide anonymous, aggregate measurements and do not collect personally identifiable information through this website.

browserStorage.heading: Browser Storage
browserStorage.intro: The chatbot uses browser storage to improve the chat experience. The
browserStorage.bubbleSeen: sessionStorage key remembers that the chat prompt has been shown or dismissed during the current browser session. The
browserStorage.chatbotSession: localStorage key temporarily keeps recent chatbot messages for about 30 minutes so a conversation can continue if the page reloads.

managing.heading: Managing Cookies
managing.body: You can control cookies and browser storage through your browser settings. Blocking essential cookies or clearing storage may affect referral tracking, preview access, or chatbot convenience features, but the public website should remain generally accessible.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: For questions about this Cookie Policy, contact Roomchang Dental Hospital at contact@roomchang.com, +855 69 811 338, or +855 11 811 338.

generalInfo.heading: General Information Only
generalInfo.body: The information on this website is provided by Roomchang Dental Hospital for general educational and informational purposes. It is not medical, dental, or clinical advice and should not be used as a substitute for an in-person consultation with a qualified dentist or other healthcare professional.

consultation.heading: Professional Consultation
consultation.body: Dental needs vary from patient to patient. You should consult a qualified dentist before starting, changing, or delaying any dental or medical treatment. If you have pain, swelling, trauma, infection symptoms, or another urgent concern, contact a healthcare professional promptly.

treatmentResults.heading: Treatment Results
treatmentResults.body1: Treatment outcomes depend on many factors, including oral health, diagnosis, treatment plan, patient cooperation, and follow-up care. Results vary, and no website content can guarantee a specific result.
treatmentResults.body2: Any before-and-after cases, clinical examples, photographs, or patient stories shown on this website are illustrative. They may not represent the outcome that every patient can expect.

websiteAccuracy.heading: Website Accuracy
websiteAccuracy.body: We aim to keep website information clear and current, but dental techniques, fees, availability, and service details may change. Please contact Roomchang Dental Hospital directly to confirm information that may affect your care or appointment.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: Roomchang Dental Hospital is located at {address}. For questions or appointment enquiries, contact {email}, {phone1}, or {phone2}.

appointmentRequests.heading: Appointment Requests
appointmentRequests.body1: The Roomchang Dental Hospital website accepts appointment requests through the contact and booking form. A request is not a confirmed appointment until a Roomchang team member contacts you and confirms the details.
appointmentRequests.body2: We usually respond within about one business day. Response times may vary depending on clinic workload, public holidays, the complexity of your request, and the contact details provided.

informationNeeded.heading: Information Needed
informationNeeded.body: To help us review your request, please provide accurate contact details and relevant preferences, such as your treatment interest, preferred branch, preferred doctor, preferred date, and any important notes about your visit.

rescheduling.heading: Rescheduling and Cancellations
rescheduling.body: If you need to reschedule or cancel, please contact the clinic as soon as possible by phone, WhatsApp, Telegram, or email. Early notice helps us offer the appointment time to another patient and arrange a new time for you.

clinicHours.heading: Clinic Hours
clinicHours.body: Roomchang Dental Hospital clinic hours are Monday to Saturday, 08:00 to 17:30. Appointment availability may vary by branch, doctor, treatment, and clinical schedule.

location.heading: Location
location.body: Roomchang Dental Hospital is located at No. 4, Street 184, Phnom Penh, Cambodia. The hospital has served local and international dental patients since 1996.

consent.title: Cookies & privacy
consent.message: We use cookies to understand how our site is used and to improve your experience. Essential cookies always stay on.

descriptions.sisowathHighSchool: Our flagship 10-storey hospital with 46 dental chairs, 4 operation rooms, an in-house CAD/CAM digital laboratory, and the full specialist team.
descriptions.roseCondo: Serving the Bassac and BKK residential communities, this branch offers specialist consultations and treatments in a quiet, accessible setting.
descriptions.aeonMall: Conveniently located on the 1st floor of AEON Mall Sen Sok — offering the full range of Roomchang dental services, 7 days a week.
descriptions.phEuroPark: Located within the Euro Park development in Borey Peng Huoth — serving residents on the eastern side of Phnom Penh along National Road 1.
descriptions.funMall: Inside Fun Mall on TK Avenue in Toul Kork — our most recently opened branch, serving one of Phnom Penh's fastest-growing residential and commercial areas.
